*📖 Chapters:*
00:00 - Experiencing Life's Downside Variation
01:23 - What do we do?  Math vs. Drugs
02:12 - Zero-Sum Games and EV (edge)
04:11 - You are the Counterparty in Life's Transactions
04:47 - Judgement Free Zones and Social Ambiguity
06:51 - Key Takeaway: Judge, Act with Positive EV
